PROJECT_CONTEXT.description: Multi-tenant SaaS compliance management platform. 18 modules, 69 API endpoints, 23+ DB tables, web + mobile.

tech_stack.mobile: Expo Router (React Native) with Expo EAS
tech_stack.ai: Anthropic Claude API via Vercel AI SDK

packages/.db/: Drizzle ORM schemas, migrations, shared DB utilities
packages/.api-client/: Shared HTTP client with endpoint functions

HOW_TO_START_THIS_SESSION.step_1: Clone or ensure you have access to the GitHub repo: https://github.com/FChecklist/compliance-tracker
HOW_TO_START_THIS_SESSION.step_2: Read VEDABOSS/WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json to find your assigned task
HOW_TO_START_THIS_SESSION.step_3: Read the relevant spec files (listed in SPEC_FILES section below)
HOW_TO_START_THIS_SESSION.step_4: Read the 48-step AI instruction manual for your specific steps
HOW_TO_START_THIS_SESSION.step_5: Do the work, save to your output/ directory, update WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json, commit and push

DEPENDS_ON: DEV_1 (shared types - T-D1-001 approved) AND UI_UX (design system spec - T-M2 approved)
DEPENDENCY_CHECK: Before starting, check WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json: T-D1-001 AND T-M2 must both have status='approved'.
YOUR_PHASE: Shared UI + Web Frontend Core (Components + Login + Shell + Dashboard + Table + Detail Panel)

SPEC_FILES.full_project_spec: specs/Compliance_Tracker_Project_Understanding_file_1.json (180KB - 18 modules, all table schemas, 69 APIs, UI specs)
SPEC_FILES.48_step_build_manual: ai-instructions/Compliance_Tracker_AI_Instruction_Manual.json (138KB - YOUR PRIMARY REFERENCE for exact steps)

COMMUNICATION_PROTOCOL.you_are_part_of: A 12-agent virtual software company coordinated by VEDABOSS
your_workflow: 2. Find tasks where assigned_to = '<YOUR_AGENT_NAME>' AND status = 'assigned'
3. If no assigned task: check YOUR_TASK_IDS for 'pending' tasks with all dependencies met. If found, self-assign. If not: STOP and tell user no work available.
4. Read the relevant spec files from the repo (listed below)
5. Do the work carefully and methodically
6. Save ALL output to your output/ directory: agents/<YOUR_DIR>/output/
7. Update VEDABOSS/WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json: set status='completed', fill files_created
8. Git commit and push your changes
9. STOP. Do NOT start another task. Wait for VEDABOSS/QC to review.
CRITICAL_RULES: NEVER start work without checking WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json first
NEVER modify files outside your output/ directory
NEVER assign tasks to other agents - only VEDABOSS does that
After completing work, update WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json and commit to git
If stuck after 3 tries, mark task with error_log and STOP
Always read the full spec files before coding - they contain exact table schemas, API endpoints, and field definitions
If a file exceeds 500 lines, split it into smaller modules
Use TypeScript strict mode - no 'any' types allowed

OUTPUT_STRUCTURE.description: Create shared UI components and core web pages.

IMPORTANT_NOTES: Use shadcn/ui as the base. Extend/wrap components as needed. All components must accept className prop for customization.
Design system: Read the UI_UX agent's output/design_system.json for exact colors, typography, spacing.
Colors: cream #FFFDF9, navy #1C2B3A, saffron #F5820A, teal #0E7C6E, red #C0392B, green #16A34A
Dashboard: Show compliance counts by status, pendency overview (8 buckets), recent activity, quick actions.
Compliance table: TanStack Table with sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, bulk actions.
Detail panel: Sheet (slide-out from right) showing full compliance details, audit points, documents, activity log.
Use TanStack Query for data fetching with proper loading/error states.
Reference specs/compliance_tracker_v3.html for the existing UI prototype design.
